perks.summary: import a HuggingFace/NGC detection model into a DeepStream pipeline — ONNX acquire, TRT engine build, nvinfer parser, benchmark + report (destructive)
inspect an ONNX model file — report inputs/outputs/opset/IR/producer, unique operators, validity, and a machine-parseable input_name/height/width summary (read-only)
list the files in a public NVIDIA NGC model version (the NGC counterpart of hf_list_files) so the acquire phase knows what to download
bake a fixed batch dimension into a batch-1 ONNX — patch input/output batch dims and internal Reshape nodes, writing a new static-batch ONNX
render the 5 fixed benchmark PNG charts (trtexec BS=1-vs-MAX, GPU throughput, DS streams-vs-fps, trt-vs-ds, pipeline efficiency) from a benchmark_data.json
remove a model's scoped staging artifacts (build/.venv_<name>, models/<name>/hf_model, models/<name>/onnx_export) after ONNX export, preserving the shared venv (destructive; supports dry-run)
